workspace.title: AniGamer Official Catalog
workspace.subtitle: Trending, new, category, and keyword actions open official AniGamer pages only; streams and ads are never bypassed.
workspace.placeholder: Paste an official AniGamer title or episode URL
workspace.initial_preview: Search the public title catalog or browse official category entry points.
workspace.wrong_site: This workspace accepts only official ani.gamer.com.tw URLs.

ui.boundary: Safety boundary: reads only the public title catalog, cover art, and episode list, then opens official pages in the system browser. It never downloads streams, exports comments, reads cookies, or bypasses sign-in, payment, region, or ads.
ui.filter_note: This panel applies one quick tag. To combine up to five tags, continue in the official page that opens.
ui.query_placeholder: Enter a title or paste an official animeRef.php?sn=... URL
ui.retry_unavailable: There is no previous AniGamer operation to retry.
ui.initial_status: Search by title, then select a result to list official episodes through the episode child MOD.
ui.title: Title
ui.episodes_enable_prompt: The episode guide child MOD is off. Enable it and load the selected title's official episode list now?
ui.open_series: Open Selected Title in System Browser
ui.open_episode: Play Selected Episode in System Browser (Recommended)
ui.next_episode_unavailable: There is no next loaded episode.
ui.history_tooltip: Open recently handed-off or previewed AniGamer episode pages stored locally
ui.history_empty: No local AniGamer open history yet
ui.history_clear_prompt: Clear only the local open history? Offline media archives will not be touched.
ui.history_clear_failed: Unable to clear the local AniGamer open history.
ui.history_export_failed: Unable to export the local AniGamer open history.
ui.parent_required: Enable the AniGamer parent MOD first
ui.search_unavailable: AniGamer search child MOD is unavailable
ui.episodes_unavailable: AniGamer episode child MOD is unavailable
ui.offline_unavailable: AniGamer offline archive child MOD is unavailable
ui.offline_boundary: Save the selected episode's public data and cover, then explicitly import one user-owned video and its subtitle sidecars. It never extracts streams, reads cookies, or bypasses DRM, sign-in, payment, region, or ads.
ui.offline_prefix_placeholder: Optional prefix for the local archive folder
ui.offline_suffix_placeholder: Optional suffix for the local archive folder
ui.offline_media_missing: Qt Multimedia is unavailable in this build.
ui.offline_media_playing_unknown: Trying local media with unverified codec compatibility: {path}
ui.offline_media_runtime_unsupported: This Qt Multimedia runtime does not support the selected format: {path}
ui.offline_select_files: Select one video and one or more subtitle files (SRT, ASS, VTT, TTML, or XML).
ui.embedded_loading: Loading the official page. Page loading does not confirm that video can play.
ui.embedded_page_loaded: The official page loaded. Checking only this computer's HTML5, H.264/AAC, HLS, and MSE capability; site playback is not yet confirmed.
ui.embedded_load_failed: The official page could not be loaded in the embedded view. Use the system browser fallback.
ui.embedded_capability_supported: Qt WebEngine reports local HTML5 and H.264/AAC support with an HLS or MSE playback path. This does not confirm site playback; use the system browser if playback still fails.
ui.embedded_capability_unsupported: Qt WebEngine lacks local H.264/AAC support or a usable HLS/MSE playback path. Use the system browser; MediaManager will not download codecs or bypass site restrictions.
ui.embedded_capability_unknown: MediaManager could not determine the embedded engine's local media capability. Use the system browser fallback.
ui.embedded_renderer_terminated: The embedded browser process stopped. Close this view and use the system browser fallback.
ui.embedded_webengine_unavailable: The embedded compatibility view is unavailable. Use the System Browser button; no external app was opened.
ui.system_browser_open_failed: The official page could not be handed to the system browser. Copy this URL and open it in Edge or Chrome: {url}
ui.offline_initial: Select a title, list its episodes, then select one episode.
ui.offline_disabled: Enable both the AniGamer parent and offline archive child MODs first.
ui.offline_importing: Copying the video and subtitle files; you can cancel at any time…
ui.offline_imported: Video and subtitle files were copied safely: {path}
ui.offline_verifying: Verifying video/subtitle files and SHA-256; you can cancel at any time…
ui.offline_verified: Offline video and subtitle hashes verified: {path}
ui.offline_verify_no_media: The offline record is valid; no video or subtitle files are linked yet.
ui.offline_verify_invalid: Offline video/subtitle integrity failed: {state}; import the files again to repair it.
ui.offline_cancelled: Video/subtitle import was cancelled and temporary files were removed.
ui.enable_search: Enable both the AniGamer parent and search child MODs first.
ui.catalog_running: Reading the public AniGamer official catalog…
ui.search_invalid: AniGamer search failed: the search MOD returned an invalid result.
ui.search_found: Found {count} official titles; select one to show its episodes.
ui.search_empty: No official titles found. Try a shorter or different keyword.
ui.search_browser_verification: AniGamer search currently requires Cloudflare browser verification. MediaManager will not bypass it. Open the official catalog above, select a title, copy its animeRef.php URL, and paste it into the search box.
ui.select_series: Select an official AniGamer title first.
ui.enable_episodes: Enable both the AniGamer parent and episode guide child MODs first.
ui.episodes_running: Reading the selected title's official episode list…
ui.episodes_invalid: AniGamer episode listing failed: the episode MOD returned an invalid result.
ui.episodes_found: Listed {count} episodes; select one to open the official page.
ui.episodes_empty: The official title page currently has no public episodes to list.
ui.episodes_browser_verification: AniGamer currently requires Cloudflare browser verification for title pages. MediaManager will not bypass it. Open the selected title on the official site, choose an episode, then paste its official animeVideo.php URL below.
ui.episode_fallback_note: Automatic episode guidance was stopped by the official browser verification. Open the selected title on AniGamer, choose the correct episode, then paste the animeVideo.php?sn=... address here. Changing titles clears the old URL so an episode cannot be assigned to the wrong title.
ui.episode_fallback_open: Open Selected Title in System Browser
ui.manual_episode_placeholder: Paste the official selected episode URL: https://ani.gamer.com.tw/animeVideo.php?sn=...
ui.manual_episode_requires_series: Select an official title first, then paste the episode URL chosen on the official site.
ui.manual_episode_invalid: Enter a canonical AniGamer animeVideo.php?sn=... official URL.
ui.manual_episode_added: Added “{title}”. You can open its official page or save a local offline index.
ui.series_opened: Handed “{title}” to the system browser. Page loading and playback are not yet confirmed.
ui.episode_opened: Handed “{title}” to the system browser. Playback is not yet confirmed.
ui.catalog_rejected: Refused to open a non-official AniGamer catalog URL.
ui.catalog_opened: Handed AniGamer “{label}” to the system browser. Page loading is not yet confirmed.
ui.filter_invalid: The AniGamer catalog filters are invalid.

ani-gamer.name: Official Catalog
ani-gamer.purpose: Trending, new, all-title, and category entry points

ani-gamer-search.name: Search
ani-gamer-search.purpose: Search public official titles with cover art

ani-gamer-episodes.name: Episode Guide
ani-gamer-episodes.purpose: List public episodes from an official title page and open each on AniGamer

ani-gamer-offline.name: Offline Archive
ani-gamer-offline.purpose: Store public data, cover art, and a copy of user-owned local media for one selected episode
ani-gamer-offline.control_location: AniGamer Catalog → Selected Episode Offline Archive

ani-gamer-player.name: Official Player
ani-gamer-player.purpose: Open selected official episodes in the embedded player or system browser; play user-selected local media
